allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "node: $\(try { node -v } catch { 'none' }\)"; Write-Output "npm: $\(try { npm -v } catch { 'none' }\)"; Write-Output "shopify: $\(try { \(shopify version\) } catch { 'none' }\)"; Write-Output "cargo: $\(try { cargo --version } catch { 'none' }\)")

PowerShell(npm exec -- shopify app function build --path extensions/hide-free-shipping 2>&1)
